title: DataPrepXJob
description: Canonical job submission contract shared across gateway-go, ml-engine-py, and agent-orchestrator. Single source of truth per CLAUDE.md §7 (cross-service contracts defined once).

job_type.description: Phase 1 only implements 'noop'. 'full_pipeline' is reserved for later phases and must not be accepted by gateway-go until the corresponding phase lands.

dataset_id.description: References datasets.id. Must exist before a job can be submitted.

config.description: Job-specific configuration. Empty for noop jobs. Structure for full_pipeline is defined in later phases, not here.
